title: Chlamydia trachomatis PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fpu6g","text":"OmpA gene PCR: PCR DNA extract (5 μl) was used to amplify a 1087 pb fragment of the ompA gene of C. trachomatis, using primers NRO (5’CTCAACTGTAACTGCGTATTT3’) and NLO (5’ATGAAAAAACTCTTGAAATCG3´). PCR amplification processes commenced with a 4-minute denaturation step at 95°C and continued with 49 amplification cycles. Each cycle consisted of a first denaturation step at 95°C for 1 min, an annealing step at 55°C for 1 min and a final step of chain elongation at 72° C for 1.5 min. ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":97,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9fp2a","text":"Cryptic Plasmid PCR: The primers used to generate a 201-bp fragment from the cryptic plasmid of C. trachomatis were CTP1 (5'-TAGTAACTGCCAClTCATCA-3') and CTP2 (5'-TTCCCCTTGTAATTCGTTGC-3'). The PCR amplification consisted of DNA denaturation at 95°C for 4 min followed by 35 cycles of amplification. Each cycle consisted of 1 min at 95°C, 1 min at 55°C and 1.5 min at 72°C followed by a final elongation at 72°C for 4 min. The ompA gene and cryptic plasmid PCR products were visualized after electrophoresis in a 1% agarose gel by ECO-Gel 20.000X Highway staining. Positive and negative controls were used in all determinations of PCR.","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":96,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Pre Amplification Mix 12.5 µL, Mint Master Mix 6.5 µL, Agua ultrapura 0.5 µL, each primer ( NRO/NLO for ompA gene, and CTP1/CTP2 for cryptic Plasmid)

I n a thermocycler , incubate as follows for ompA gene: 95 °C 00:04:00 49 amplification cycles as follows: 95 °C 00:01:00 55 °C 00:01:00 72 °C 00:01:30 Incubate as follows for Cryptic Plasmid: 95 °C 00:04:00 35 amplification cycles as follows: 95 °C 00:01:00 55 °C 00:01:00 72 °C 00:01:30 followed by a final elongation 72 °C 00:04:00
Visualization of PCR products in 1.5% agarose gel 0.75 g, Agarose 50 mL, Water 3 µL, Eco Gel
creator: Ana Ximena Kiguen
